## Testing

- [ ] `npm run build` and `npm run typecheck` pass
- [ ] `npm run test:node` and `npm run test:bun` pass
- [ ] `RIGHTSIZE_BACKEND=docker` integration tests pass (if behavior-affecting; see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `RIGHTSIZE_BACKEND=microsandbox` integration tests pass (if behavior-affecting)
- [ ] `npm run docs:verify` passes (if docs/README samples changed)
- [ ] New/changed public API has TSDoc
